text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is the ability of computers and machines to perform tasks that typically require human intelligence. A key part of AI is machine learning, where systems learn from data instead of following exact instructions. A more advanced form is deep learning, which uses complex networks inspired by the human brain to process information. You already use AI in daily life, such as when your phone suggests words while typing, streaming services recommend movies, or navigation apps find the fastest route. These technologies learn from your habits to improve over time, making tasks easier and more efficient.
